extra.message: User-controlled 'username' parameter is directly concatenated into a Jinja2 template string via from_string(). An attacker can inject Jinja2 template expressions (e.g., {{ 7*7 }}, {{ config }}, or RCE payloads using Python introspection) which will be evaluated server-side. This allows arbitrary code execution.

cwe: CWE-1336: Incorrect Parsing, Canonicalization, or Comparison
CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code
CWE-95: Improper Neutralization of Directives in Dynamically Evaluated Code
